articles.description: Hardik Pandya gave a serious talk in the Mumbai Indians dressing room as the franchise suffered its third consecutive loss of the IPL 2026 season.

articles.title: Banks, Corporates Urge SEBI To Fix QIP Pricing As Fundraising Grinds To A Minimum
articles.description: Under existing SEBI rules, the floor price for QIPs and preferential issues is calculated based on the higher of the average closing price over the preceding two weeks or 26 weeks.

articles.title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Cash-for-votes storm dims Sobha Surendran’s sheen
articles.description: Jamaat-e-Islami serves legal notice on Sobha Surendran for blaming it for the murder of RSS leader Sreenivasan in Palakkad on April 16, 2022

articles.title: L&T Shares Trade Lower After IGSL Acquisition Announcement
articles.description: Larsen & Toubro share price was trading at Rs 3,926 per share at the time of writing, declining by nearly 1 percent.

articles.title: Jasprit Bumrah still wicketless in IPL 2026, longest dry spell in his career: R Ashwin says, ‘When you can’t bowl…’
articles.description: Jasprit Bumrah faces an unusual IPL phase, having gone 5 matches without a wicket. Critics suggest he should adopt a more aggressive approach while former players emphasise his economic bowling skills over wicket-taking.

articles.title: Struggling Sunrisers brace for Sooryavanshi challenge against in-form Royals
articles.description: Struggling Sunrisers brace for Sooryavanshi challenge against inform Royals

articles.title: Those hit by SIR deletions may see their other rights diluted: Prashant Bhushan
articles.description: Yogendra Yadav warned that the removal of the names of lakhs of voters through the SIR exercise may extend beyond electoral disenfranchisement and impact other identity-linked rights

topStories.title: Lessons from the 1970s help U.S. and global economies absorb oil shocks
topStories.description: Economies are less vulnerable now than they were when a similar war in West Asia drove up fuel prices, triggering stagflation in the 1970s; decades of reforms have improved efficiency, cut reliance on West Asian oil, built reserves, and expanded alternative energy, but oil is still king, say experts

topStories.title: Trump Says It Will Block Already Blocked Hormuz. How Will It Work
topStories.description: Any US blockade is likely to inflict economic damage on Tehran, which would ultimately undermine its ability to continue fighting over the long term by denying it the ability to export oil and earn...

topStories.title: Congress moves Supreme Court against cancellation of Ponda Assembly bypoll in Goa
topStories.description: The Bombay High Court’s Goa bench quashed the ECI’s notification for bypoll in Ponda, citing violation of the Representation of the People Act, as the legislature’s term is set to expire in less than a year

topStories.title: Software engineer from Vizianagaram drowns in U.S. river on his birthday
topStories.description: Singireddy Sai Krishna, 29, a software engineer from Bobbili in Vizianagaram district, drowns in the Meramec river in Missouri while celebrating his birthday

topStories.title: Is a blockade an act of war? Here's what we know as Trump moves to block the Strait of Hormuz
topStories.description: During the Cuban Missile Crisis, for example, the Kennedy Administration was careful to label its naval action to stop further deliveries by Soviet ships a ‘quarantine.’ The reason for this was that a ‘blockade’ is an act of war under international law.

topStories.title: Iran taunts US over Strait of Hormuz blockade, fuel prices: Internet reacts to viral post, ‘Americans would survive…’
topStories.description: The Strait of Hormuz is vital to global oil shipments, and any blockade could cause sharp price increases. On 13 April, the Speaker of Iran's Parliament shared a screenshot of current petrol prices at Washington DC fuel stations.

topStories.title: Iran blockade: Allies split on Trump’s planned Strait of Hormuz blockade. How did nations react?
topStories.description: Australia's Prime Minister Anthony Albanese has called for the Strait of Hormuz to remain open. He stated that the U.S. has not requested Australian assistance for a blockade amid rising tensions following U.S.-Iran ceasefire talks.

topStories.title: Trump announces naval blockade: How will US forces actually stop ships in Strait of Hormuz? What will be the impact?
topStories.description: A blockade as a ‘belligerent operation to prevent vessels and/or aircraft of all States, enemy and neutral, from entering or exiting specified ports, airfields, or coastal areas belonging to, or under the control of an enemy State,’ the US Navy Commander's handbook on naval operations says.

topStories.title: 'Pope Leo is WEAK': Trump launches unprecedented attack on first American Pope over Iran War
topStories.description: Trump unleashed a lengthy tirade against Pope Leo XIV on Truth Social, accusing the first American pope of being soft on Iran, Venezuela and crime — and claiming credit for his election to the papacy.

topStories.title: Oil prices surge past $103 a barrel after US announces blockade of Iran
topStories.description: Asian stocks fall as naval blockade threat injects new turmoil into financial markets.

topStories.title: Action being taken against Cong leaders on ‘conspiracy’ to defeat party candidate in bypoll: K’taka CM
topStories.description: Karnataka CM Siddaramaiah announced action against Congress leaders over alleged internal conspiracy in Davanagere South by-election amid resignations.

topStories.title: Watch | Budapest erupts in celebration as historic election ends Trump-ally Orban's 16-year rule in Hungary
topStories.description: Videos on Monday showed Budapest's famous Chain Bridge illuminated in Hungary‘s national colours and along the embankment by the Danube river tens of thousands partied, waving the national flag with some toasting with champagne in paper cups, Reuters reported.

dailyNews.title: Tech View: Nifty upside seen at 24,500–24,600; support at 23,700
dailyNews.description: Dalal Street's technical outlook improved with a market rebound, but US-Iran tensions introduce uncertainty. Analysts suggest buying Nifty futures around 24,106 with upside targets at 24,500-24,600. Top stock picks include Jamna Auto Industries, Dhampur Sugar Mills, Birlasoft, Gujarat Ambuja Exports, Olectra Greentech, and Eicher Motors, all showing bullish technical indicators.

dailyNews.title: Congressman Eric Swalwell quits California governor race amid sexual misconduct claims
dailyNews.description: Top Democratic allies intensified pressure on him to exit the gubernatorial race.

dailyNews.title: Oil jumps 8% to above $100 ahead of US blockade on Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: Oil prices surged past $100 a barrel as the U.S. Navy prepared to blockade the Strait of Hormuz, following failed talks to end the war with Iran. This move is expected to significantly restrict Iranian oil shipments and exacerbate existing supply disruptions. President Trump acknowledged potential high oil and gasoline prices through November's midterm elections.

dailyNews.title: Global Markets | Dollar and oil rise, stocks slide as US-Iran peace talks collapse
dailyNews.description: Oil and the dollar surged as U.S.-Iran talks failed, leaving a ceasefire fragile and Mideast energy exports choked. Stocks tumbled as U.S. Navy blockades the Strait of Hormuz, impacting global energy supplies and fueling inflation fears. Markets are grappling with significant uncertainty following the breakdown of peace negotiations.

dailyNews.title: US military threatens to blockade all Iranian ports starting on Monday
dailyNews.description: Vessels will still be able to transit the Strait of Hormuz to and from non-Iranian ports, says US Central Command.

dailyNews.title: Iran blockade: ‘China can send their ships to us’, Trump pitches US oil exports as global energy crisis deepens
dailyNews.description: Donald Trump wants China to send tankers to the US amid the Iran blockade. With 20 million barrels per day halted at the Strait of Hormuz, can American oil fill the gap?

dailyNews.title: US Iran Ceasefire Talks LIVE Updates: US says it will blockade Iranian ports after ceasefire talks fail
dailyNews.description: US Iran Ceasefire Talks LIVE Updates: Diplomatic efforts to end the US-Iran conflict fail in Muscat. Both sides recall envoys as the Pentagon warns of ‘Phase 2’ operations. Oil prices surge toward $130.

dailyNews.title: Oil jumps above $100 after US-Iran talks end without a deal
dailyNews.description: The failure of negotiations at the weekend has raised concerns that the global energy crisis will deepen.

dailyNews.title: Iran war live: US military says it will block Iranian traffic in Hormuz
dailyNews.description: CENTCOM says the blockade will begin at 14:00 GMT, as Iran warns of even higher prices at the pump.

dailyNews.title: Iran was inches away from US deal in Islamabad, says Araghchi as Trump announces Hormuz blockade
dailyNews.description: Iran's Finance Minister's statement comes after the US Central Command announced that American forces will begin implementing a blockade on all maritime traffic entering and exiting Iranian ports at 10 am ET on 13 April.

dailyNews.title: Dinghy route taken by missing American woman and jailed husband recreated as details of disappearance emerge
dailyNews.description: Brian Hooker remains in a Freeport, Bahamas jail as police investigate the disappearance of his wife off Elbow Cay.

dailyNews.title: NYC mayor touts ‘socialist’ wins in first 100 days alongside Bernie Sanders
dailyNews.description: Mayor Zohran Mamdani highlights major policy wins in his first 100 days, crediting a democratic socialist agenda as Bernie Sanders praises the approach.

dailyNews.description: Bruce Springsteen's former drummer Vini Lopez speaks out against the Boss's anti-Trump rhetoric, saying everyone should respect the president.

dailyNews.title: JD Vance returns to Washington after 16 hours of Iran peace talks collapse in Pakistan
dailyNews.description: Vice President JD Vance's marathon negotiations with Iranian officials in Islamabad failed to produce a deal, prompting President Donald Trump to order a Strait of Hormuz blockade.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Gas Prices Might Not Drop By Midterms, Highlighting G.O.P. Peril
dailyNews.description: The president has sent mixed messages on how long he expects costs to be high. Some in his party voiced fresh concern after his comments on Sunday.

dailyNews.title: ‘The Strangest Sleepover Ever’: Dutch Skeptical as Their Royals Visit Trump
dailyNews.description: The Dutch king and queen are set to stay at the White House on Monday night. At a time of trans-Atlantic tension, the Netherlands isn’t sure how it feels about that.

dailyNews.title: Trump Fires Board That Oversees Presidio in San Francisco
dailyNews.description: All six board members that oversee the national historic landmark were terminated, part of the administration’s efforts to reshape the federal bureaucracy.

dailyNews.title: Cuba’s President Projects Defiance in Standoff With the U.S.
dailyNews.description: Miguel Díaz-Canel’s stance on “Meet the Press” reflected how Cuba is digging in against pressure from a Trump administration distracted by the war in Iran.

dailyNews.title: Trump Attacks Pope Leo as Too Liberal and ‘Weak on Crime’
dailyNews.description: President Trump’s lengthy post on social media showed there were really no boundaries when it comes to people he might target, including the leader of the world’s 1.4 billion Catholics.

dailyNews.title: Trump calls Pope Leo "WEAK on Crime, and terrible for Foreign Policy."
dailyNews.description: Pope Leo has been critical of the war in Iran and other priorities of the Trump administration.

dailyNews.title: 4/12: CBS Weekend News
dailyNews.description: Trump says U.S. will blockade Strait of Hormuz after Iran peace talks collapse; oil prices fueling inflation amid Iran war.

dailyNews.title: Latest on Iran war as Trump announces Strait of Hormuz blockade
dailyNews.description: A marathon round of talks between the U.S. and Iran over the weekend failed to produce a peace agreement, leading President Trump to announce a bloackade of the Strait of Hormuz. Imtiaz Tyab and Taurean Small have more.

dailyNews.title: Trump says U.S. will blockade Strait of Hormuz, intercept ships that paid Iran
dailyNews.description: President Trump said the U.S. Navy will begin blockading ships from entering or exiting the Strait of Hormuz and intercept vessels that have paid tolls to Iran.

dailyNews.title: Iran's parliament speaker says U.S. will be "nostalgic" for $4 gas as oil prices fuel inflation
dailyNews.description: Iranian parliament speaker Mohammad Bagher Qalibaf said Americans would soon be "nostalgic for $4-$5 gas" after President Trump announced a blockade of the Strait of Hormuz on Sunday. Taurean Small reports on the pain at the pump currently being felt across the United States.

dailyNews.title: Trump says U.S. will blockade Strait of Hormuz after Iran peace talks collapse
dailyNews.description: President Trump says the United States will blockade the Strait of Hormuz, stepping up pressure on Iran after peace talks in Pakistan ended without a breakthrough. Imtiaz Tyab has more.
